_comment: SYNTHETIC fixture for tests/unit/resolve-client-chat-id.test.sh. Mirrors the fleet-roster.json shape (top-level 'boxes' dict keyed by box-slug). Contains ONLY the sanctioned placeholder chat id 1234567890 and obviously-synthetic client names. NO real client name or chat id ever appears here.

wibble-widgets.note: synthetic fixture entry — valid numeric chat id

wibble-industries.note: synthetic fixture entry — shares the 'wibble' substring to exercise ambiguity

foobar-unconfirmed.note: synthetic fixture entry — chatId sentinel, must be treated as not-found

zorp-sprocket.note: synthetic fixture entry — resolvable by its box-slug key
